posts.title: 导师简介
posts.text: 姜晓燕，上海工程技术大学电子电气工程学院副教授、硕导，海归博士。在视频多目标跟踪、SLAM定位、图像分割、多源融合等2D/3D领域进行了深入研究，已发表论文30余篇，其中SCI/EI重点刊物论文22篇。国际会议ICPCSEE2019的学术委员会成员、在信息与计算机前沿技术国际会议ICFTIC2019、国际信息技术研讨会IWITC2021作主旨报告；为多个顶级期刊与国际会议的评审。作为主要参与人获得上海市科技进步奖二等奖。已申请发明专利3项，授权实用新型专利5项。 现为电子与电气工程学院多维度人工智能科研团队负责人，团队注重科技研发的同时，积极推进人工智能技术的产业化。与各行业企业开展产学研合作，以5G + AI为未来模式，已在智能交通、三维场景建模、视频监控、瑕疵巡检、智慧医疗等方面取得多项成果，并应用到实际场景中。研究涵盖计算机视觉领域的多个课题：多目标跟踪、域自适应行人重识别、语义分割、视觉SLAM。所负责的项目应用到的领域：智能交通、视频监控、大型客机表面喷漆瑕疵检测、工业缺陷检测、胃癌淋巴结转移检测、眼震疾病诊断、心脏周期分析等；曾获德国DAAD、中国政府奖学金CSC资助。曾获上海工程技术大学研究生工作贡献奖、上海工程技术大学电子电气工程学院优秀教师等荣誉。 邮箱：xiaoyan.jiang@sues.edu.cn.

posts.title: 主要项目成果
posts.text: 项目列表：1. 2021.01-2024.12，国家自然科学基金，民航联合基金重点项目（U2033218），多源数据融合的机场道面关键参数提取和状态评估技术； 2. 2018.01-2020.12，国家自然科学基金青年项目（61702322）：跨摄像头网络多目标跟踪数据关联建模与身份重识别； 3. 2018.07-2020.06，上海市科委重点项目（18511101600）：基于多源无缝定位导航的桥梁无人机巡检技术及应用示范； 4. 2019.04-2019.11，上海欣诺通信技术股份有限公司：智能SC端子状态图像识别算法研究与开发； 5. 2019.01-2020.03，上海飞机制造有限公司(19)DZ-003：基于无人机的飞机表面喷漆状态智能检测系统设计与研发； 6. 2019.01-2023.12，国家自然科学基金重点项目（61831018）：自主学习的移动互联网视频传输基础理论与方法； 7. 2018.01-2021.12，国家自然科学基金面上项目（61772328）：面向物体级的视觉SLAM动态三维场景解析与重建； 8. 2018.06-2021.06，上海市科委重点项目（18411952800）：基于CT影像的胃癌分期数据挖掘应用及其诊治决策智能辅助系统初构研究； 9. 2017.07-2019.06，上海市教委优秀青年教师培养资助计划（ZZGCD16008）：多摄像机网络下基于深度学习的多目标三维跟踪； 10.2015.11-2018.10，上海市科委地方院校能力建设项目（15590501300）：多源特征融合的主动式行车安全分析与预警平台。

posts.title: 主要论文成果
posts.text: 团队成员作为第一作者，已在多项SCI期刊发表20余篇论文。1.Yang Li and Xiaoyan Jiang* and Jenq-Neng Hwang. Effective Person Re-identiﬁcation by Self-Attention Model Guided Feature Learning. Knowledge-Based Systems, 2019 (SCI, IF 5.101)，一区. 2.Xiaoyan Jiang and Yongbin Gao and Zhijun Fang and Bo Huang. An End-to-end Human Segmentation by Region Proposed Fully Convolutional Network. IEEE Access. Vol. 7: 16395-16405, 2019 (SCI, IF 4.098)，二区. 3.Y.-J. Xiong, L. Liu, S.-J. Lyu, Patrick S. P. Wang and Y. Lu, Improving text-independent Chinese writer identification with the aid of character pairs, International Journal of Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence, (2019) 33(2) In press. 4.Jingming Zhao and Juan Zhang and Zhi Li and Jenq-Neng Hwang and Yongbin Gao and Zhijun Fang and Xiaoyan Jiang and Bo Huang. DD-CycleGAN: Unpaired image dehazing via Double-Discriminator Cycle-Consistent Generative Adversarial Network. Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence. 82:263-271. 2019 (SCI, IF 3.526)，二区. 5.Xiaoyan Jiang and Zhijun Fang and Neal N. Xiong and Yongbin Gao and Bo Huang and Juan Zhang and Lei Yu and Patrick Harrington. Data Fusion-Based Multi-Object Tracking for Unconstrained Visual Sensor Networks. IEEE Access. Vol. 6: 13716-13728, 2018 (SCI, IF 4.098)，二区. 6.Chen J, Chen J, Ling J, et al. Link Failure Recovery in SDN: High Efficiency, Strong Scalability and Wide Applicability. Journal of Circuits Systems & Computers, 2018, 27(06):69-74. (SCI). 7.Xiaoyan Jiang and Marcel Simon and Yuan Yang and Joachim Denzler. Multi-Marker Tracking for Large-scale X-ray Stereo Video Data.Signal Processing: Image Communication. 59(2017): 140-149，2017 (SCI, IF 2.814)，三区. 8.Y.-J. Xiong, Y. Lu and P. S. P. Wang, Off-line text-independent writer recognition: a survey, International Journal of Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence, (2017) 31(5): 1890-1903. 9.Yang Li and Xiaoyan Jiang* and Jenq-Neng Hwang. Discriminant Feature Learning with Self-Attention for Image-based Person Re-Identiﬁcation. International Conference on Neural Information Processing (ICONIP), 2019. (EI, CCF C类). 10.Anjie Wang and Yongbin Gao and Zhijun Fang and Xiaoyan Jiang* and Shanshe Wang and Siwei Ma and Jenq-Neng Hwang. Unsupervised learning of depth and ego-motion with spatial-temporal geometric constraints, IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME), 2019. (EI, CCF B类). 11.Chen J, Chen J , Ling J , et al. Failure recovery using vlan-tag in SDN: High speed with low memory requirement. Performance Computing & Communications Conference. IEEE, 2017:1-9. (EI，CCF-C). 12.Chen J, Chen J, Xu F, et al. When Software Defined Networks Meet Fault Tolerance: A Survey. Algorithms and Architectures for Parallel Processing. Springer International Publishing, 2015:351-368. (EI, CCF-C). 13.Xiaoyan Jiang and Daniel Haase and Marco Körner and Wolfgang Bothe and Joachim Denzler. Accurate 3D Multi-Marker Tracking in X-ray Cardiac Sequences Using a Two-Stage Graph Modeling Approach. International Conference on Computer Analysis of Images and Patterns (CAIP). 2013.8. 117—125. York, UK.Oral(EI). 14.Y.-J. Xiong and Y. Lu, Chinese writer identification using contour- directional feature and character pair similarity measurement, in Proceedings of the International Conference on Document Analysis and Recognition, (2017) pp. 119–124. 15.Y.-J. Xiong and Y. Lu, Off-line text-independent writer identification for Chinese handwriting, Advances in Chinese document and text processing, Series on language processing, pattern recognition, and intelligent systems, (2017) pp. 215-234. 16.Xihe Qiu and Poon Nian Lim and Shi Yun Tong and Eng San Thian. Deposition of Substituted Apatite Coatings at Different Coating Patterns via Drop-on-Demand Micro-Dispensing Technique. Materials Technology, 33 (6) 406-413. (SCI, IF 3.179). 17.Xihe Qiu and Poon Nian Lim and Eng San Thian. A Comparative Study on the In-vitro Antibacterial Behaviour of Chemically-Modified Calcium Phosphate Coatings. Materials Technology, 2018 (SCI, IF 3.179). 18.Chen S, Wang K, Sun M, et al. Spread of competing viruses on heterogeneous networks.[J]. Philosophical Transactions of the Royal Society A Mathematical Physical & Engineering Sciences, 2017:20160284. (Awarded as the best student paper of The 13th National Conference on Complex Networks). 19.Chen S, Small M, Tao Y, Fu X, Transmission dynamics of an SIS model with age structure on heterogeneous networks, Bulletin of Mathematical Biology. 2018, 80:8, 2049-208. 20.Chen S, Small M, Fu X, Global stability of epidemic models with imperfect vaccination and quarantine on scale-free networks. IEEE Transactions on Network Science and Engineering, 2019, 2327-4697.

posts.title: 一篇论文在IEEE Access中被接收
posts.text: 团队负责人姜晓燕老师的论文“Data Fusion-Based Multi-Object Tracking for Unconstrained Visual Sensor Networks” 在IEEE Access中被接收，祝贺！ Keywords:Data fusion, graph theory, Internet of Things, particle filters, visual sensor networks. Photos:

posts.title: 一篇论文被SCI期刊Signal Processing-Image Communication录用
posts.text: 团队负责人姜晓燕老师的论文“Multi-marker tracking for large-scale X-ray stereo video data” 被SCI期刊《Signal Processing-Image Communication》 接收，祝贺！ Keywords:Multi-object tracking, Data association, Directed acyclic graph, X-ray, Big data. Photos:

posts.title: 一篇论文被SCI期刊Medical Physics录用
posts.text: 团队负责人姜晓燕老师的论文“ADR‐Net: Context extraction network based on M‐Net for medical image segmentation” 被SCI期刊 《Medical Physics》 接收，祝贺！ Keywords:Medical image segmentation, Deep Learning, Attention gate Mechanism, Dilation convolution, Residual, Spatial pyramid pooling.

posts.title: 一篇论文被SCI期刊Applied Intelligence录用
posts.text: 团队2018级研究生蒋光好同学的论文“An efficient attention module for 3d convolutional neural networks in action recognition” 被SCI期刊《Applied Intelligence》 录用，祝贺！ Keywords:Effective attention module, 3D CNN, Deep learning, Action recognition. Photos:

posts.text: 团队2017级研究生黎阳同学的论文“Discriminant Feature Learning with Self-Attention for Image-based Person Re-Identiﬁcation” 在International Conference on Neural Information Processing (ICONIP) 中被接收，祝贺！ Keywords:Distance Metric, Pentaerythrityl Triacrylate, Reranking.

posts.title: 团队相册
posts.text: 实验室2017级~2020级同学与导师姜晓燕合影。团队合影 导师指导同学参加研究生电子竞赛

posts.title: 2021研电赛获两项三等奖
posts.text: 实验室2019级、2020级研究生同学参与“兆易创新杯”第十六届研究生电子设计竞赛，陶杭宇、范柳伊等同学的参赛项目：“基于Jetson Nano的行人安全社交距离检测系统”、“基于手势识别的少儿智能识物系统”，均获得上海赛区三等奖，祝贺！

posts.title: 学术活动
posts.text: 2019年9月21日，应AEIC组委会邀请，团队负责人姜晓燕博士前往大连参加International Conference on Frontiers Technology of Information and Computer会议，并做主旨报告。 2016年8月12日，团队负责人姜晓燕博士参加中韩学术交流研讨会（2016 The Summer Workshop），并做交流报告，引起强烈反响。
